<think>I opened DOC1_A6 and found the exact information needed. The document shows:

"一年内到期的非流动资产|15,491.66|113,843.56"

This is from the consolidated balance sheet of 中国全聚德(集团)股份有限公司 (Quanjude Group Co., Ltd.) as of March 31, 2024.

The question asks for "全聚德一年内到期的非流动资产是多少" (What is Quanjude's non-current assets due within one year?).

The document shows:
- 期末余额 (ending balance): 15,491.66元
- 期初余额 (beginning balance): 113,843.56元

Since the question asks for the current value, the 期末余额 (15,491.66元) is the relevant figure.
